name: Champagne Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large punch bowl, combine the granulated sugar, lemon juice, white wine, champagne, soda water, and grated pineapple.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
3. Add ice to the mixture and garnish with additional pineapple pieces and fresh fruits such as strawberries.
4. Allow the mixture to chill before serving in small glasses.
